title: DJ Equipment Rentals

seo.title: DJ Equipment Rentals — BEATROX
seo.description: Beatrox provides professional DJ equipment rentals for festivals, nightlife events, and brand activations — CDJs, mixers, controllers, and full booth setups with technical support.

og.title: DJ Equipment Rentals — BEATROX Portland
og.description: Industry-standard DJ equipment for world-class performances — Pioneer CDJ-3000, DJM mixers, and full booth packages from Beatrox.

hero.headline: DJ Equipment Rentals
hero.subheadline: Industry-standard DJ equipment for world-class performances — delivered, set up, and supported by our team.

capabilities: Full Booth Packages for Touring Acts

body.content: Whether it's a festival headliner, a club night, or a brand event featuring live DJ performance, Beatrox provides complete DJ equipment rental packages configured to artist specs. We work with DJs and event producers to spec the right gear, deliver it to venue, and provide on-site technical support.

body.heading: Why Choose Beatrox
items: 15+ years of experience in live event production
Full-service team from design to strike
Portland-based with nationwide coverage
Trusted by Adidas, Netflix, CNN, Amazon Music

body.heading: Our Process
items: 1. Discovery Call — We learn your vision, venue, and budget
2. Design & Pre-Visualization — See your event before it happens
3. Equipment & Crew — We source everything and assign the right team
4. On-Site Execution — Professional setup, operation, and strike
5. Post-Event Review — We ensure everything exceeded expectations

body.heading: Ideal For
items: Festival main stages and after-parties
Nightclub residencies and one-off events
Brand activations and experiential events
Corporate events with DJ entertainment
Touring DJs and traveling acts

body.heading: What's Included
body.content: Our DJ rental packages can be built around Pioneer DJ CDJ-3000 and DJM-900NXS2 systems, along with custom DJ booth fabrication, monitor speakers, recording interfaces, and full cable management. We also offer touring-grade road cases for traveling acts and can integrate DJ rigs directly into our audio production and LED visual systems.

body.heading: DJ Booth Design Options
body.content: The DJ booth is the visual centerpiece of any event. We offer custom booth designs ranging from sleek, low-profile setups for intimate clubs to large, illuminated installations for festival stages. Options include LED-integrated facades, branded wraps, custom facades with your logo, and modular designs that adapt to any venue size. Our team designs, builds, and installs the booth — then integrates it with your audio and visual systems for a seamless experience.

body.heading: Artist Rider Compliance & Backup Equipment Policy
body.content: We take artist riders seriously. Every DJ package is configured to match the exact models and firmware versions specified. Before load-in, we verify all equipment, test every connection, and confirm compatibility with the artist's USB drives and laptops. We also maintain a backup equipment policy — duplicate CDJs, mixers, and cables are on standby at every event to ensure zero downtime if a failure occurs.

body.heading: Available Equipment
items: Pioneer DJ CDJ-3000 & CDJ-2000NXS2 media players
Pioneer DJM-900NXS2 & Allen & Heath Xone mixers
Technics SL-1200 turntable systems
Denon DJ and Rane controller options
Custom DJ booth fabrication available
Road-case and touring-ready packages

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks in advance for standard rentals and 8–12 weeks for custom productions. Last-minute requests are often accommodated depending on availability.

items.question: Do you travel outside Portland?
items.answer: Absolutely. While we're headquartered in Portland, OR, we regularly serve clients across the West Coast and nationwide for touring and large-scale events.

items.question: What's included in the rental?
items.answer: Every rental includes delivery, setup, on-site technical support, and strike. Custom packages can also include content design, pre-visualization, and dedicated project management.

items.question: Can you build a custom DJ booth?
items.answer: Yes. We design and fabricate custom DJ booths with LED integration, branded facades, and modular sizing — from intimate club setups to large festival stages.

items.question: Do you provide backup equipment?
items.answer: Yes. We maintain backup CDJs, mixers, and essential cables at every event. If any equipment fails, we swap it immediately with zero interruption to the performance.
